features.name: CSV Upload & Parsing
features.description: Multi-format CSV parser (Sberbank, Tinkoff, Alfa) with auto-detect encoding/delimiter/bank

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email + Telegram auth with JWT, bcrypt, rate limiting

features.name: AI Spending Analysis
features.description: AI-powered transaction categorization, top-5 categories, totals

features.name: Roast Mode
features.description: AI-generated humorous spending critique with rate limiting (1/day free, unlimited Pro)

features.name: Subscription Detection
features.description: Detect recurring payments, flag parasites (unused 30+ days), calculate totals

features.name: Share Card Generation
features.description: Privacy-safe roast share cards with blurred amounts and referral links

features.name: Spending Dashboard
features.description: Pie chart by category, bar chart daily spending, month-over-month trends

features.name: Savings Recommendations
features.description: AI-generated personalized savings tips with estimated amounts

features.name: Pro Subscription (499 RUB/mo)
features.description: Payment integration, plan management, unlimited roasts for Pro

features.name: Weekly Report
features.description: Email/push weekly spending summary with roast

features.name: Savings Goals
features.description: Set and track savings goals with progress visualization

features.name: Hype Mode
features.description: Positive encouragement mode as alternative to roast
